description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a sturdy, rectangular structure with a deep blue body and purple trim outlining its edges. The front panel houses a large, dark display screen, flanked by two red joysticks and several red buttons arranged for two-player gameplay. The top marquee displays the word 'CRASH' in bold, yellow letters with a stylized, energetic font, referencing the Crash Bandicoot franchise. Both side panels are adorned with a pixelated image of Crash Bandicoot's face, adding a playful and nostalgic touch. The cabinet's surface appears to be made of wood or MDF with a matte laminate finish, and the control panel is slightly recessed for ergonomic access. The back panel is plain, lacking any visible vents or access doors.
description: A blue and purple arcade game cabinet with Crash Bandicoot-themed artwork, dual joysticks, and a large display screen. The cabinet features a bold marquee and pixelated side graphics.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the pixelated Crash Bandicoot face graphic and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large screen, dual red joysticks, multiple red buttons, and the 'CRASH' marquee at the top.
description_view_2: Right side view, mirroring the left, with the same Crash Bandicoot face graphic and visible control panel depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned blue panel with no visible features or graphics.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (the screen is dark and unlit, with a flat rectangular shape and a visible bezel, but the display technology is not identifiable)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and six red buttons arranged in two clusters, suitable for two-player side-by-side play; the panel is blue with no visible markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the word 'CRASH' in bold, yellow, stylized letters with a white outline and a playful, energetic theme referencing Crash Bandicoot.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display a large, pixelated image of Crash Bandicoot's face in orange, black, and white, set against the blue background.
